## How to contribute

1. Fork and clone this repo. `git clone https://github.com/<YOUR-USERNAME>/dracula-variants`
2. Create a branch for your changes. `git checkout -b my-new-feature`
3. Install dependencies. `npm install`
4. Open the *dracula-variants* folder in VS Code.
5. Make your changes in `src/dracula.yml` or `src/dracula-light.yml`.
6. Run `npm run build` to generate theme JSON files.
7. Debug > Start Debugging (F5) to test in an Extension Development Host.
8. Commit and push your changes.
9. Submit a PR for discussion.
